reason: Replace duplicated inline tables with one reviewed engine. Preserve the 2024 Gazette Schedule as the rate source explicitly referenced by JRB 2026 guidance, enforce the 1 January 2026 regime boundary, double eligible non-passive rates when Tax ID is unavailable, and fail closed for unsupported combinations or unverified relief.
auditDisagreement: An independent audit proposed 5% for resident rent. The primary Gazette First Schedule states 10% for resident and non-resident corporate and non-corporate rent, hire or lease. The engine therefore retains 10%, with a dedicated regression test.
